release_notes: Cloud transcription via OpenRouter (opt-in) — GPT-4o Transcribe, Whisper, Qwen and more for higher accuracy when you want it; local Whisper stays the private, offline default. New 'Prompting' mode turns your dictation into a clean, structured prompt for coding AI agents like Claude Code and Cursor, with a fast model fallback chain. Fixed a clipboard stall that delayed pasting. Your API key is stored encrypted on-device (Windows DPAPI).
